---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

**Screenshots / Mockups**
If applicable, add screenshots or mockups to illustrate the feature.

**Additional context**
Any other information, links, or references that might help.
